case_title: A. JORDAN AKERLEY et al VS. KENDRA BECHTEL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,608.73 FILED BY AKERLEY, A. JORDAN HABER, RIK AS TO DEFENDANT BECHTEL, KENDRA HIRPA, DURETTI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUL-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BECHTEL, KENDRA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED JUL-10-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HIRPA, DURETTI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AKERLEY, A. JORDAN HABER, RIK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BECHTEL, KENDRA HIRPA, DURETTI $1,122.95 PRINCIPAL, $145.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,267.95, PLAINTIFFS' CLAIM AGAINST DURETTI HIRPA IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $329.98, AN AMOUNT ALREADY PAID TO THE PLAINTFFS BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
